kernelfusion.name: kernelfusion.dev
kernelfusion.tagline: Single-kernel fusion — 2,865× on Apple Silicon, 623× on phones.
kernelfusion.shortDesc: The research line. Two published preprints, one npm SDK, 592 real devices tested. The theory that all the applied projects build on.

webgpudna.name: webgpudna.com
webgpudna.tagline: Geant4-DNA Monte Carlo in the browser. One fused dispatch per primary.
webgpudna.shortDesc: Electron track-structure simulation ported from the CNRS/IN2P3 Geant4-DNA toolkit to WebGPU. One thread per primary, full 10 keV history in a single for-loop. Radiolysis chemistry and DNA damage scoring live in a browser tab.

zerotvm.name: zerotvm.com
zerotvm.tagline: Phi-3-mini in the browser — 10 hand-written kernels, no compiler.
zerotvm.shortDesc: Phi-3-mini (3.8B) running end-to-end via 10 kernel roles across 27 WGSL files, replacing the 85 TVM-autotuned shaders WebLLM needs. ~40 tok/s on M2 Pro, 22% behind WebLLM.

gpubench.name: gpubench.dev
gpubench.tagline: How fast is your GPU in the browser?
gpubench.shortDesc: Open WebGPU compute benchmarks on 592 real devices — Rastrigin, N-body, Monte Carlo Pi, RL environments. Every result published, no cherry-picking.

neuropulse.name: neuropulse.live
neuropulse.tagline: Watch a real 3.8B transformer think — every tensor rendered 1:1 from WebGPU.
neuropulse.shortDesc: A real forward pass of Phi-3-mini visualised tensor-by-tensor. 3.8 billion parameters, your GPU, your browser — every glow is a live activation read back from WebGPU. Zero server, zero API key.

barisgunaydin.name: barisgunaydin.com
barisgunaydin.tagline: Independent researcher — kernel fusion, GPU compute, browser-native ML.

markview.name: markview.ai
markview.shortDesc: A small utility for rendering markdown files in the browser. One of the earlier experiments that became kernel-fusion.

safenpm.name: safenpm.dev
safenpm.tagline: npm install, but you see what you're installing.
safenpm.shortDesc: Inspect npm packages before adding them to your project — dependency tree, post-install scripts, license, maintainer, file list. Pre-install sanity check for the registry.

fusedlora.name: fused-lora
fusedlora.tagline: LoRA fine-tuning of BitNet b1.58 2B4T, live in a browser tab.
fusedlora.shortDesc: First public demo of fine-tuning a ternary LLM entirely in the browser via WebGPU. ~86 ms/step on M-series laptops. Adapters emit as 4 MB .flora files. Includes a Phi-3 LoRA reference.

webgpuDna.name: webgpu-dna (secondary)
webgpuDna.tagline: Secondary Cloudflare Pages deploy for webgpudna (preview/experimental surface).
webgpuDna.shortDesc: Separate CF Pages project used alongside the canonical webgpudna.com — kept live intentionally. Not a distinct product; same codebase.

webgpuq.name: webgpu-q
webgpuq.tagline: Full-featured quantum circuit simulator in a single browser tab.
webgpuq.shortDesc: Statevector + MPS quantum simulator running on commodity hardware via WebGPU compute. Six-level research ladder from bandwidth-bound statevector through MPS, kernel fusion, WebRTC swarm, IBM hardware cross-verify, to chemistry/VQE. No CUDA, no install.
